title: WATCH:  3 American fighter jets shot down by friendly fire
fullText: 3 American fighter jets shot down by friendly fireNew video shows American F-15s falling from the sky in Kuwait. The crew members ejecting safely, the U.S. said.March 2, 2026
summary: New video shows American F-15s falling from the sky in Kuwait. The crew members ejecting safely, the U.S. said.
